targets.query: from(bucket: "ha_raw") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value") |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.entity_id and r.entity_id =~ /^(sensor\.)?(dashboard_temp_salon|dashboard_temp_gabinet|dashboard_temp_sypialnia|dashboard_temp_pokoj_ali|dashboard_temp_lazienka_dol|dashboard_temp_lazienka_gora|dashboard_temp_garderoba|dashboard_temp_wejscie)$/) |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: if r.entity_id == "dashboard_temp_salon" then "Salon" else if r.entity_id == "dashboard_temp_gabinet" then "Gabinet" else if r.entity_id == "dashboard_temp_sypialnia" then "Sypialnia" else if r.entity_id == "dashboard_temp_pokoj_ali" then "Pokój Ali" else if r.entity_id == "dashboard_temp_lazienka_dol" then "Łazienka dół" else if r.entity_id == "dashboard_temp_lazienka_gora" then "Łazienka góra" else if r.entity_id == "dashboard_temp_garderoba" then "Garderoba" else if r.entity_id == "dashboard_temp_wejscie" then "Wejście" else r.entity_id })) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"]) |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "ha_raw") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value") |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.entity_id and r.entity_id =~ /^(sensor\.)?(lodowka_power|pralka_power|rekuperacja_power|komputer_power|komputer_power_2|sterownikdol_power)$/) |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: if r.entity_id == "lodowka_power" then "Lodówka" else if r.entity_id == "pralka_power" then "Pralka" else if r.entity_id == "rekuperacja_power" then "Rekuperacja" else if r.entity_id == "komputer_power" then "Komputer" else if r.entity_id == "komputer_power_2" then "Komputer 2" else if r.entity_id == "sterownikdol_power" then "Sterownik dół" else r.entity_id })) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"]) |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "ha_raw") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value") |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.entity_id and r.entity_id =~ /^(sensor\.)?(lodowka_power|pralka_power|rekuperacja_power|komputer_power|komputer_power_2|sterownikdol_power)$/) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> group(columns: ["_time"]) |> sum() |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"]) |> set(key: "_field", value: "Razem") |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"]) |> yield(name: "total")

from(bucket: "ha_raw") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value") |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.entity_id and r.entity_id =~ /^(sensor\.)?(dashboard_temp_salon|dashboard_temp_gabinet|dashboard_temp_sypialnia|dashboard_temp_pokoj_ali|dashboard_temp_lazienka_dol|dashboard_temp_lazienka_gora|dashboard_temp_garderoba|dashboard_temp_wejscie)$/) |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: if r.entity_id == "dashboard_temp_salon" then "Salon" else if r.entity_id == "dashboard_temp_gabinet" then "Gabinet" else if r.entity_id == "dashboard_temp_sypialnia" then "Sypialnia" else if r.entity_id == "dashboard_temp_pokoj_ali" then "Pokój Ali" else if r.entity_id == "dashboard_temp_lazienka_dol" then "Łazienka dół" else if r.entity_id == "dashboard_temp_lazienka_gora" then "Łazienka góra" else if r.entity_id == "dashboard_temp_garderoba" then "Garderoba" else if r.entity_id == "dashboard_temp_wejscie" then "Wejście" else r.entity_id })) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"]) |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "ha_raw") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value") |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.entity_id and r.entity_id =~ /^(sensor\.)?(roslina_palma_temperature|slzb_06mu_core_chip_temp|slzb_06mu_zigbee_chip_temp)$/) |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: if r.entity_id == "roslina_palma_temperature" then "Palma (roślina)" else if r.entity_id == "slzb_06mu_core_chip_temp" then "SLZB – CPU" else if r.entity_id == "slzb_06mu_zigbee_chip_temp" then "SLZB – Zigbee" else r.entity_id })) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"]) |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "ha_raw") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value") |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.entity_id and r.entity_id =~ /^(sensor\.)?(lodowka_power|pralka_power|rekuperacja_power|komputer_power|komputer_power_2|sterownikdol_power)$/) |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: if r.entity_id == "lodowka_power" then "Lodówka" else if r.entity_id == "pralka_power" then "Pralka" else if r.entity_id == "rekuperacja_power" then "Rekuperacja" else if r.entity_id == "komputer_power" then "Komputer" else if r.entity_id == "komputer_power_2" then "Komputer 2" else if r.entity_id == "sterownikdol_power" then "Sterownik dół" else r.entity_id })) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"]) |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "ha_raw") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value") |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.entity_id and r.entity_id =~ /^(sensor\.)?(lodowka_power|pralka_power|rekuperacja_power|komputer_power|komputer_power_2|sterownikdol_power)$/) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> group(columns: ["_time"]) |> sum() |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"]) |> set(key: "_field", value: "Razem") |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"]) |> yield(name: "total")

from(bucket: "ha_raw") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value") |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.entity_id and r.entity_id =~ /^(sensor\.)?(lodowka_energy|pralka_energy|rekuperacja_energy|komputer_energy|komputer_energy_2|sterownikdol_energy)$/) |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: if r.entity_id == "lodowka_energy" then "Lodówka" else if r.entity_id == "pralka_energy" then "Pralka" else if r.entity_id == "rekuperacja_energy" then "Rekuperacja" else if r.entity_id == "komputer_energy" then "Komputer" else if r.entity_id == "komputer_energy_2" then "Komputer 2" else if r.entity_id == "sterownikdol_energy" then "Sterownik dół" else r.entity_id })) |> increase() |> last() |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"]) |> yield(name: "used")

from(bucket: "ha_raw") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value") |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.entity_id and r.entity_id =~ /^(sensor\.)?(lodowka_energy|pralka_energy|rekuperacja_energy|komputer_energy|komputer_energy_2|sterownikdol_energy)$/) |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: if r.entity_id == "lodowka_energy" then "Lodówka" else if r.entity_id == "pralka_energy" then "Pralka" else if r.entity_id == "rekuperacja_energy" then "Rekuperacja" else if r.entity_id == "komputer_energy" then "Komputer" else if r.entity_id == "komputer_energy_2" then "Komputer 2" else if r.entity_id == "sterownikdol_energy" then "Sterownik dół" else r.entity_id })) |> increase() |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"]) |> yield(name: "energy")
